description: You are an IT operations engineer responsible for onboarding two new commercial tenants onto the building's shared Emoncms energy monitoring server at http://localhost (admin/admin). Create separate user accounts for 'tenant_a' (tenant_a@building.local) and 'tenant_b' (tenant_b@building.local). Each tenant must have energy consumption data posted for inputs 'hvac_w' and 'lighting_w' using their specific write API keys (node 'floor_a' for tenant_a; node 'floor_b' for tenant_b). Configure input process lists to log data to named feeds and create dedicated monitoring dashboards: 'Tenant A Energy' for tenant_a and 'Tenant B Energy' for tenant_b.
